secondary.description: Soft green for success and reassuring actions (emerald-600)

background.description: Warm white / stone-50 to reduce harsh glare

surface.description: Pure white for cards to contrast against background

text.description: Stone-900 for primary text, ensuring APCA contrast compliance

destructive.description: Clear red for Emergency Contact button

rules: Patient UI MUST use body_large as the minimum readable text size.
Never center align dense text blocks. Keep text left-aligned for reading ease.
Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.

button.patient: w-full min-h-[80px] text-xl rounded-3xl font-semibold shadow-md active:scale-95 transition-transform
button.caregiver: h-12 px-6 rounded-xl font-medium shadow-sm active:scale-95 transition-transform

card.patient: bg-white border-2 border-stone-200 rounded-3xl shadow-sm hover:border-sky-600 transition-colors cursor-pointer

components.surface_strategy: Solid warm backgrounds only. NO glassmorphism, as it reduces legibility for elderly users.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle border color change and mild drop-shadow increase.
motion_and_interactions.active: Clear down-state scaling (active:scale-[0.98]) for tactile feedback.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Do not use auto-playing animations on Patient UI.

image_urls.description: Nurse smiling with elderly patient in room - For main landing page hero
Elderly couple looking at a smartphone together - For 'How it Works' or Family Connection section
Elderly man face portrait - For patient profile picture or Important People cards
Smiling elderly woman face portrait - For patient profile picture or Important People cards
Medical logo - Fallback for partner/sponsor logos

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='record-memory-btn').
accessibility_and_testing.aria_roles: Use aria-labels heavily on icon buttons. Ensure screen reader friendly transcripts for memory features.
accessibility_and_testing.touch_targets: Minimum 48x48px for Caregiver UI, Minimum 80x80px for Patient UI.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure standard HTML/Tailwind is used for the landing page for creative flexibility.
Use pure Shadcn components for Caregiver and Admin dashboards, heavily adjusting their rounded corners to match the 'rounded-xl' styling.
For the Patient UI, DO NOT use standard small Shadcn cards. Rebuild large, accessible touch-target cards with 'border-2' and 'rounded-3xl'.
Avoid deep nested navigation in the Patient UI. Use a flat, linear task flow. Emphasize recognition over recall.
Include the red 'Emergency Contact' button prominently on the Patient Dashboard.
Never use purely transparent backgrounds. Always ensure a solid surface behind text for elderly users.
